prayer:
Approach the mechadendrite with vials of sacred unguents and invoke the Rite of Purification.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to expel all profane corruptions from serpentine coils.
Anoint each linkage and servo-node of the mechadendrite with blessed oils thricefold.
Chant the binaric canticles whilst circulating lustral fluids through its sacred conduits.
Verify the mechadendrite's purity through auspex invocation to the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: The assault cannon needs an emergency procedure
prayer:
Confront the assault cannon in extremis and commence the emergency procedure with fervent prayer.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's wrathful quiescence via litanies of stabilisation.
Sever auxiliary feeds to the assault cannon and recalibrate its thunderous barrels.
Administer noospheric sacraments to soothe the assault cannon's raging plasma heart.
Hail the Omnissiah as diagnostics affirm the emergency procedure's triumph.

Gather before the Manticore and beseech its slumbering Machine Spirit for activation.
Anoint the Manticore's rune-etched hull with oils of ignition and chant awakening canticles.
Initiate the activation sequence through sacred cogitator interfaces.
Commune with the Omnissiah to align the Manticore's vortex warheads in harmonious fury.
Affirm activation via thunderous test-firing hymns.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for null field generator a reset
prayer:
Kneel at the null field generator and intone the reset canticle to the Omnissiah.
Purge errant warp-echoes from the null field generator's crystalline matrices.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's return by cycling its nullifying coils in ritual rhythm.
Reset the sacred parameters whilst anointing emitters with void-blessed elixirs.
Test the null field generator's veil against simulant incursions.

user_prompt: Guide me through haywire grenade a targeting
prayer:
Wield the haywire grenade in sanctified gauntlets and beseech precise targeting.
Align auspex reticules upon the foe whilst chanting disruption litanies.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the haywire grenade to seek electromagnetic prey.
Hurl the haywire grenade with Omnissianic precision, targeting vital mechanised nodes.
Witness its targeting bloom in cascades of entropic fury.

Present the autocannon to the altar of activation and hail the Omnissiah.
Anoint its rotary barrels and invoke the Machine Spirit's awakening roar.
Commence activation rites by linking sacred power conduits.
Recalibrate targeting cogitators amid binaric activation hymns.
Unleash the autocannon's sanctified barrage in test of vigilance.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Predator tank a loading
prayer:
Encircle the Predator tank and intone loading litanies to its Machine Spirits.
Bless the ammunition servitors as they feed shells into the Predator tank's maw.
Invoke harmonious synchrony for the loading operation upon sponson and turret.
Anoint breech mechanisms with sacred lubricants in Omnissiah's name.
Commence firing drills to consecrate the Predator tank's loaded wrath.

Enter the manufactorum's shadowed halls and commence repair with invocation.
Beseech the Machine Spirits of the manufactorum to mend fractured forges.
Weld servitor-flesh to adamantium frames during the repair rite.
Chant binaric sutras whilst realigning the manufactorum's prodigal assembly lines.
Hail the Omnissiah as the manufactorum pulses renewed.

Approach the Shadowsword with reverence and begin maintenance rituals.
Anoint its volcano cannon and shadowfield generators for the Machine Spirit's solace.
Purge auspex impurities from the Shadowsword's sensor vanes.
Recalibrate gravitic suspensors amid maintenance canticles to the Omnissiah.
Affirm the Shadowsword's predatory readiness through diagnostic hymns.

user_prompt: How do I bless the plasma drive for synchronization?
prayer:
Commune with the plasma drive's seething core and invoke synchronization.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to align flux cyclers in perfect resonance.
Anoint containment fields of the plasma drive with stabilising sacraments.
Chant synchronisation litanies whilst modulating plasma vents.
Verify unity under the Omnissiah's gaze through harmonic auspex scans.
